pr.title: Record: Packed Causal N-gram + Dirichlet Backoff — val_bpb 0.0180 (3-seed    mean)

output.summary: Packed causal n-gram artifact plus Dirichlet posterior mixing blends a 2-layer GPT’s logits with high-order n-gram counts in single-pass score-first eval.
techniques: Packed order-2–12 n-gram hash tables zipped into artifact to warm cache from the start
Greedy Dirichlet posterior backoff with count-confidence gating selects the highest reliable order
Single-pass score-first sliding-window eval with distributed cache prefill
